Describe the sequence of visual scenes and text overlays shown throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a coastal city skyline appears with text about the Beirut explosion; at 8s, the view shifts to a mosque and church tower with location text; at 12s, the scene changes to ocean waves with the title Generation 17; at 16s, a woman is seen driving a car with the name Nadine Khaouli displayed.

question: Has the person wearing a neon yellow high-visibility vest started using a shovel to move a pile of gray material?
